briefdescription.para: This function configures the DC subsystem pointer with video timing, stream sources, input/output formats, CSC coefficients, global alpha, audio settings, cursor blend, and partial plane blend parameters.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if audio/video settings are valid, otherwise XST_FAILURE.
Cursor blend and partial plane blend are configured here before hardware init (XDcSub_ConfigureDcVideo).

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the application configuration by assigning DC subsystem, DMA, DP, and frame buffer pointers, then initializing frames and configuring the DC subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure.

simplesect.para: User-configurable parameters (resolution, format, cursor, audio) are set from the menu in main() before this function is called.

briefdescription.para: The purpose of this function is to configure the test params and the platform driver & Xdc driver to set DC Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure.

briefdescription.para: Implements non-live display pipeline setup and execution helpers.
